_comment_SessionStart: Runs scripts/preflight.ps1 before every session so the first conversation turn includes repo-state context (active changes, mvn compile, working tree, branch, per-change artefacts, Supabase backup freshness). Prefers pwsh 7+ for speed; falls back to powershell.exe (Windows PS 5.1) when pwsh is absent — script is PS 5.1-compatible. See openspec/changes/harness-progress-tracking/design.md Decision 5 + Decision 7 for rationale (informational hook, never blocks a session).

SessionStart.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/preflight.ps1 2>nul || powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts\preflight.ps1
